rawAssistant: A trek eastward, eh? Considering the wind carries soot and debris, a sturdy cloak like yours would serve well to keep the elements at bay. Though, if you're planning to set up camp, perhaps a lighter-weight travel cloak with some water-resistant treatment might be more practical. We've had some travelers come back from those eastern routes with tales of dusty storms – it's always better to be prepared.
